name: Nurgle’s Gift (Aura)
community_notes: -1T always active (Contagion). Plague choice: hill-climbing selects -1 Save (most offensive), equivalent to +1 AP. Other plague options are -1 to enemy Hit (defensive) and -1 M/Ld/OC (utility).
